purpose: Render the blended WelcomeInvite (group variant) for a genuine first-time visitor opening a /groups/?join=&admin=&name= invite link, hosting the existing name gate and join action inline with no separate join card shown afterward; a returning user keeps today's JoinRequestCard behavior unchanged.

public_api.name: JoinRequestCard
public_api.signature: export default function JoinRequestCard({ nonce, adminNpub, groupName }: JoinRequestCardProps): JSX.Element
public_api.description: Unchanged public props/signature. Internally now branches its pre-send, not-yet-sent render on isFreshIdentity (from useNostrIdentity): true renders WelcomeInvite (group variant) hosting the same nameDraft/requestDisabled/handleSendRequest state; false renders the pre-existing inline card unchanged. All guard branches (loading, identity-not-ready, invalid admin npub, already-a-member) and the sent-confirmation render are untouched and fire identically for both variants.

public_api.name: isNameGateActive
public_api.description: Unchanged pure predicate, reused by both variants.

public_api.name: isJoinRequestDisabled
public_api.signature: export function isJoinRequestDisabled(gateActive: boolean, draftName: string): boolean
public_api.description: Unchanged pure predicate, reused by both variants.

dependencies_forbidden: No new relay/network read to resolve the group name (URL param only, AC-GROUP-2/AC-PRIV-2)
No modification to app/src/lib/marmot/joinRequestSender.ts transport logic
No new i18n keys — welcome.* (S2) and groups.joinRequestButton (existing) cover all copy needed
test_targets: app/tests/unit/components/JoinRequestCard.test.ts (existing, must still pass unmodified — pure predicates unaffected)
notes: groups.tsx is unchanged: it already renders JoinRequestCard unconditionally for the join-param branch, and JoinRequestCard now internally decides which presentation to use based on isFreshIdentity. This keeps AC-GROUP-1's 'no separate join card shown afterward' true by construction (a single component instance, a single render branch) rather than requiring two sibling components in groups.tsx. This is a deliberate deviation from the story prompt's groups.tsx-branch suggestion (option b); option (a) from the composition guidance was chosen as the cleaner structure.
